_metadata.description: Compliance ruleset served by the MCP ComplianceRulesServer
_metadata.note: Rules are loaded dynamically by the Auditor Agent via MCP tool calls

general.description: Document must not contain raw credit card numbers (PII violation).
Document must not expose unmasked Aadhaar numbers.
Document must have a clearly identifiable issuing party or organization.
Document must include a date of issuance or effective date.

invoice.description: Must contain a valid 15-digit GSTIN (Goods & Services Tax ID).
Must display a clear 'Total Amount Due' with currency.
Must include an invoice number for audit trail purposes.
Must specify HSN/SAC codes for all line items.
Must include both buyer and seller PAN or GSTIN details.

certificate.description: Must mention 'FSSAI' and a valid FSSAI registration number.
Must specify the certificate validity period (start and expiry dates).
Must be signed or stamped by an authorized regulatory body.
Must include the name and address of the certified entity.

contract.description: Must include names and signatures of all contracting parties.
Must specify the contract duration or effective/expiry dates.
Must include a dispute resolution or jurisdiction clause.
Must define the scope of work or deliverables clearly.

report.description: Must include the reporting period covered by the report.
Must be signed or approved by an authorized signatory.
Financial reports must follow applicable accounting standards (Ind AS / GAAP).
